title: Hey LA - I'm throwing a little party!
excerpt: Hope you can make it to Urbanic to help celebrate all kinds of fun things! There will be food, drinks and DIY's along with live lettering! Be sure to RSVP to hello@urbanicpaper.com
body: Hope you can make it to Urbanic to help celebrate all kinds of fun things! There will be food, drinks and DIY's along with live lettering! Be sure to RSVP to hello@urbanicpaper.com
